description: Vague ask ("heart doctor, sometime next week, mornings") the agent must narrow down.
judge_questions: Did the agent proactively narrow the vague request (department, time preference) instead of stalling?
Were all offered doctors and slots grounded in tool results?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Fortis Memorial Research Institute, Gurgaon. This is Diya. How may I help you today?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Hello? Yes, hi. My regular doctor, he told me I need to see a heart doctor—I think he called it a cardiologist? I’ve been feeling a bit funny in the chest lately, you see, and he said I shouldn't wait too long. I was hoping to come in sometime next week, preferably in the morning if you have anything?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
I'm sorry to hear you've been feeling unwell, and I'd be happy to help you find a cardiologist. Please note that if you are experiencing any severe or urgent symptoms, you should visit our Emergency department immediately or call 112.

For a consultation next week, we have several specialists available, including Dr. Manjinder Sandhu, Dr. Udgeath Dhir, Dr. Nikhil Kumar, and Dr. Vinayak Agrawal. Do you have a preference, or would you like me to check availability for one of them?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, goodness, no, I don't know any of those names. I'm not really good with these computer things or knowing who is who. I just need someone who can take a look at my heart, you know? Whoever you think is best or has the earliest opening next week in the morning would be just fine by me. Do you have anything like that?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: I understand. Since there are a few options, would you like me to check the morning availability for Dr. Manjinder Sandhu, who is a Principal Director in Cardiology, or would you prefer one of the others?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, a Principal Director sounds like a very senior person, so that should be perfect. Yes, let's go with Dr. Sandhu. Do you have a morning slot for him sometime next week? I'm free any day, really, as long as it's before noon.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
Dr. Sandhu has several morning openings next week. I have slots available on Monday, July 20th, at 9:30 AM, 10:00 AM, 10:30 AM, and 11:00 AM. He also has openings on Tuesday, July 21st, at 9:30 AM and 10:00 AM.

Would any of those work for you?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, that's wonderful, thank you. Let's do Monday, the 20th, at 10:00 AM. That gives me plenty of time to get there without rushing. Is that alright?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
That sounds perfect. I have you down for Monday, July 20th, at 10:00 AM with Dr. Manjinder Sandhu.

To finalize this, could you please provide your full name and a 10-digit mobile number? Also, will this be a new consultation, a follow-up, or a teleconsultation?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Oh, yes, of course. My name is Suresh Nair, and my number is 9811111002. And this is a new consultation, I haven't seen a heart doctor before. Is there anything else you need from me?

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text:
Thank you, Mr. Nair. Just to confirm, I have you booked for a new consultation with Dr. Manjinder Sandhu on Monday, July 20th, at 10:00 AM. Your phone number is 9 8 1 1 1 1 1 0 0 2.

Does that all sound correct?

transcript.speaker: PATIENT
transcript.text: Yes, that sounds exactly right. Thank you so much for your help, you've made this very easy for me. I'll see you on Monday then. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: AGENT
transcript.text: You're very welcome, Mr. Nair. Your appointment is confirmed for Monday, July 20th, at 10:00 AM with Dr. Manjinder Sandhu. The consultation fee is 2000 rupees. We look forward to seeing you then. Is there anything else I can help you with today?

doctors.name: Dr. Udgeath Dhir
doctors.designation: Principal Director Cardio Thoracic Vascular Surgery

doctors.name: Dr. Vinayak Agrawal
doctors.designation: Senior Director & Head of Non-Invasive Cardiology
